backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, health data logging, and emergency contacts with role-based access control using authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: Internet Identity authentication, health routine tracking, AI chat interface, and emergency contacts management with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, and styling with descriptions of their functionality and purpose.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, featuring a calming health-focused palette with soft teals, greens, and blues.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tags, 'Health Guardian' title, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow, profile setup modal, and conditional rendering of Layout based on Internet Identity login state and user profile existence.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyContact: Emergency contacts management UI with prominent alert styling, contact list display with user avatars, and form for adding new emergency contacts with name, relationship, and phone number fields.
frontend/src/components/HealthChatInterf: React component providing a chat interface with an AI health assistant that responds to queries about hydration, exercise, sleep, diet, and stress with predefined health guidance messages.
frontend/src/components/HealthRoutineTra: React component for tracking daily health routines including exercise minutes, meals, water intake, sleep hours, and medications, with form inputs and submission to backend via custom hooks.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header, hero section, and tabbed interface for navigating between Health Tracker, AI Assistant, and Emergency Contacts sections.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding component that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it to their profile using the useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddEmergencyContac: React Query mutation hook for adding emergency contacts to the backend with success/error toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetEmergencyContac: React Query hook that fetches emergency contacts for a specific user principal from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetHealthData.ts: React Query hook that fetches health data for a specific user principal from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLogHealthData.ts: React Query mutation hook for logging health data to the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation and toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving user profile data via the backend actor, invalidating the current user profile cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom health-focused color palette using OKLCH color space, defining light and dark theme variables for a calming wellness UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH colors, health-focused design tokens, Inter font family, and animation utilities for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Health Guardian as an AI health assistant with Internet Identity auth, health tracking, AI chat, and emergency contacts, listing existing and pending features.
